title: Diddles call — Rankett white-label tooling for SEO agencies, partnership scarcity
html:
Diddles call — Rankett white-label tooling for SEO agencies, partnership scarcity

Source: 2026-01-02 Apple Note. Notes from a call with Diddles about the Rankett partner program — likely the same Diddles who runs the Jan 7 meetup. Earliest captured planning of the white-label tool architecture.

TL;DR

  • Past 2 weeks recap: Diddles printed 4000 leads (Yahir didn't know), running A/B testing on 3 prompt variants in cold email, "leads machine."
  • Scarcity move: "Partnership program, only can accept 5 a month. Create scarcity and ensure that we are cultivating something that feels super legit."
  • The pitch script: "You use our white-label tool to show clients their visibility (zero training needed) / You own the sales relationship (you pitch it, you price it, you own the client) / We do all the backend work (data, tracking, optimization, monthly reporting) / You keep the margin ($2–4k per client per month) / 5 minute automated client onboarding."
  • Tool whitelabeling scope: TOOL whitelabeled (login + branding + onboarding portal + stats + client updates) but NOT the technical implementations themselves.
  • Free-work pitch for the Jan 7 meetup: 10 free businesses, "do work until client actually gets a client."
  • Defense vs DIY agencies: "would you rather net $2500 from each client and not do a bit of work or do $3500 and do an extra 15 hours of work, and build the tools and systems, and build up the testimonials" — the economic argument for using Rankett.
  • Open question: division of labor between automated and manual work for handling 10 customers.

Pattern observed

This is the fulcrum doc between the Dec 2025 12 month plan and the Jan 7 partnership meetup pitch — Yahir is mid-execution, working with Diddles on the partner-side ops.

Confirms Diddles is operational partner / sales lead for Rankett — owns the sales relationships while Yahir owns the backend.

Open questions

  • Who is Diddles? First mentioned in 2024 07 04 questions ("the Diddles/jipp idea") and the 2025 09 23 how im scraping by period. Real name?
  • Is Diddles co-founder? Equity partner? Contractor?
  • The 4000 leads — what list/source?
